Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute near Harrison/Racine
ShortDescription: 60 Blue Island/26th buses temporarily rerouted due to, street blockage near Harrison/Racine.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#60 Blue Island/26th buses temporarily rerouted due to, street blockage near Harrison/Racine.

Westbound buses will operate via Harrison, Morgan, Van Buren, Racine and over normal route.

Eastbound buses will operate via Racine, Jackson, Morgan, Harrison and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #J14 Jeffery Jump & #15 Jeffery Local Temporary Southbound Reroute near Jeffrey/94th
ShortDescription: SB J14 Jeffery Jump & 15 Jeffery Local buses are temporarily rerouted due to a street blockage near Jeffery/94th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #J14 Jeffery Jump & #15 Jeffery Local buses are temporarily rerouted via  Jeffery, 93rd, Paxton, 95th, Jeffery and over the regular route due to a street blockage near Jeffery/94th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
